name: Resonance Hyderabad

campuses.type: co-ed day scholar + hostel (main admissions campus)

MPC + IIT-JEE.note: Integrated Intermediate MPC with IIT-JEE (Main + Advanced) coaching, All India Test Series, Daily Practice Papers (DPPs)

MPC + EAMCET.note: Intermediate MPC focused on EAMCET/EAPCET for engineering seats in Telangana & AP

BiPC + NEET.note: Integrated Intermediate BiPC with NEET/AIIMS coaching, NCERT-line teaching

MPC + SAT.note: Intermediate MPC with SAT prep for students targeting foreign/private university admissions

JEE Long Term.note: Post-Intermediate / repeater long-term classroom program for JEE (Main + Advanced)

NEET Long Term.note: Post-Intermediate / repeater long-term classroom program for NEET

hostel.note: AC and non-AC rooms, veg/non-veg mess, warden supervision

results.brandWide: Resonance (national): 52,395+ JEE Advanced selections, 2,57,576+ JEE Main selections, 22,000+ NEET selections across its history

batchSize: TODO — confirm max students per section (e.g. merit batches with weekly performance tracking)
scholarships: Admission and scholarship are decided by the ResoNET test (Resonance National Entrance Test). Scholarship percentage is based on ResoNET marks — up to 100% tuition waiver; higher marks = higher scholarship. Every selected JEE (Main/Advanced), Pre-Medical (NEET) or Board-division student gets a FLAT MINIMUM 50% scholarship (this minimum does NOT apply to PCCP classes 4-10). Test mode matters: taking ResoNET at a Resonance centre (invigilated) = eligible for up to 100%; taking it online from home = up to 50% only. Exact mark-to-percentage slabs are revealed with the ResoNET result — never invent a specific slab; if a parent asks 'my child scored X, what % will they get', say the exact percentage is confirmed on the ResoNET result and offer to book the test.
admissionProcess: Free counselling session (phone or campus visit) -> register for ResoNET scholarship-cum-admission test (at centre for max scholarship, or online) -> ResoNET result gives admission + scholarship % -> seat confirmation with fee payment. Fees are typically split into installments (a large first installment at admission, balance within ~60 days). Confirm current installment terms with the admissions office.

contact.office: Admissions office; campus tours by appointment. Corporate/national helpline: +91-744-2777777

faq.What is ResoNET: ResoNET is Resonance's own scholarship-cum-admission test. Your score decides both your admission and your scholarship percentage (up to 100%).
faq.Online vs classroom: Resonance Hyderabad offers integrated Intermediate + coaching in classroom; distance/online (DLP) programs also exist for JEE, NEET and BITSAT.
faq.Number of campuses: Resonance has an extensive campus network across Hyderabad for Intermediate integrated with IIT-JEE and NEET preparation.
faq.Study material: Daily Practice Papers (DPPs), topic-wise tests, All India Test Series, recorded lectures and doubt-clearing sessions.
faq.Parent updates: TODO — confirm the Hyderabad centre's parent-update cadence (tests, progress reports, PTM slots)
